name: Adversarial Review Workflow
description: BMAD adversarial code review that MUST find issues. Implements escalating scrutiny with multiple review passes.

steps.description: Initial adversarial review pass - look for obvious and non-obvious issues
steps.exit_criteria: At least 1 issue found OR escalate to second pass

steps.description: Escalated review with increased scrutiny if first pass found no issues
steps.exit_criteria: At least 1 issue or suggestion found OR escalate to final pass

steps.description: Final maximum scrutiny pass - find at least suggestions for improvement
steps.exit_criteria: Complete review with findings or no-issues warning

steps.description: Address critical and major issues identified in review
steps.exit_criteria: All critical and major issues addressed

success_criteria: Review complete with issues addressed or documented warning for no-issues case
